problem id: c0e04922
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(3) OR NOT SHR(1)

examples:
  00010010 -> 11110110
  10110001 -> 10110111
  11000101 -> 10011101
  00011110 -> 11110011
  00000000 -> 11111111
  00000010 -> 11111110
  10111010 -> 10110111
  01011000 -> 11011011

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 10111011
